hero.title: The Last Billboard
hero.tagline: The final advertising space. Compete for visibility. Winner takes all.

explanation.title: How it works
explanation.text: Advertisers bid for space on a shared canvas. Your ad size grows logarithmically with your bid. Others can displace you by bidding higher. When the countdown ends, the billboard freezes forever.

step1.title: Place your bid
step1.description: Every advertiser gets a slot on the billboard. Your block size grows logarithmically with your bid — even a small investment gives you visible space.

step2.title: Displace competitors
step2.description: Outbid an existing slot to take it over. The previous owner gets 90% refunded automatically. The billboard reshuffles in real time.

step3.title: The freeze
step3.description: When the countdown hits zero, the billboard freezes permanently. No more bids, no more changes. Your slot stays forever — or you lose it for good.

countdown.title: Time until freeze
countdown.frozenMessage: This billboard is now permanent and will remain in its final state.

freeze.title: Billboard Frozen
freeze.message: No more bids can be placed. This billboard is now in its final, permanent state.

privacy.exportHelp: Download every record tied to your account as a JSON file: profile, bids, slots, history, reports, reveal-requests, notifications.
privacy.exportFailed: Could not generate export. Please try again.
privacy.deleteHelp: Permanently removes your profile, signs you out, and erases your uploaded images. Active slots are stripped of name/image and marked removed; bid history is anonymised. No automatic refund.
privacy.deleteFailed: Could not delete account. Please try again or contact support.

deleteDialog.title: Permanently delete account
deleteDialog.warning: Warning: this action cannot be undone.

consequence.profile: Your profile will be permanently deleted.
consequence.signout: You will be signed out immediately.
consequence.images: All uploaded images will be erased from the server.
consequence.slots: Active slots lose name, image and link and are marked removed.
consequence.history: Your bid history will be anonymised (kept for accounting purposes).
consequence.norefund: No automatic refund will be issued.

deleteDialog.confirmHelp: Type the code below exactly to confirm deletion.

freezeDate.title: Billboard freeze date
freezeDate.description: When the countdown hits this moment, no more bids are accepted and the billboard becomes permanent.
freezeDate.hint: Interpreted as UTC. The countdown in the footer reads this value.
freezeDate.warningEarlier: You are moving the freeze date earlier. In-flight Stripe sessions whose payment lands after the new freeze will be refunded automatically.
freezeDate.warningPast: This timestamp is in the past — saving will freeze the billboard immediately.

audit.title: Recent changes
audit.description: Last 10 settings changes recorded in the audit log.

concept.title: The Concept
concept.text: The Last Billboard is a digital experiment exploring scarcity, competition, and permanence in advertising. Unlike traditional billboards that rotate content or exist in multiple locations, there is only one Last Billboard, and it will only display once.

step1.title: Create an Account
step1.text: Sign in with your email using a magic link. No passwords required.

step2.title: Place Your Bid
step2.text: Choose your brand name, upload an image, set a link URL, and enter your bid amount.

step3.title: Your Slot Grows Logarithmically
step3.text: The size of your advertising slot grows with your bid, but logarithmically to ensure fairness.

step4.title: Compete for Space
step4.text: Others can outbid you, displacing your slot. You'll receive 90% of your bid as a refund if displaced.

step5.title: The Freeze
step5.text: When the countdown ends, the billboard freezes forever in its final state.

pricing.title: Pricing & Economics
pricing.commission: We charge a 10% platform fee on all bids. This covers hosting, payment processing, and moderation.
pricing.refund: If your slot is displaced by a higher bidder, you automatically receive 90% of your original bid as a refund to your payment method.
pricing.example: Example: You bid €100. If outbid, you get €90 back. The platform retains €10 regardless of outcome.

freeze.title: The Freeze
freeze.countdown: When the countdown reaches zero, the billboard enters a permanent, frozen state.
freeze.permanent: No more changes can be made. The final state becomes a permanent digital artifact, preserved as a snapshot of this unique moment in advertising history.

specifications.title: Technical Specifications
specifications.sizing: Block size: relative to your bid, logarithmically across all active bids

q1.question: What happens if I'm outbid?
q1.answer: You'll automatically receive 90% of your bid amount as a refund to your original payment method. The platform retains 10% as commission.

q2.question: Can I update my slot after bidding?
q2.answer: No. Once placed, bids are immutable. To make changes, you'll need to place a new bid that outbids your current slot.

q3.question: What happens after the freeze?
q3.answer: The billboard becomes permanent and unchangeable. All slot links remain clickable, but no new bids can be placed.

q4.question: What content is prohibited?
q4.answer: Pornography, violence, hate speech, malware, copyright violations, and illegal content are strictly prohibited. Violating slots will be removed.

q5.question: Is my payment secure?
q5.answer: Yes. All payments are processed through Stripe, a PCI-compliant payment processor. We never store your credit card information.

philosophy.title: Why This Matters
philosophy.text: In an age of infinite digital space and ephemeral content, The Last Billboard brings back the concept of scarcity and permanence. It asks: what would you say if you knew it would be preserved forever? What would you be willing to pay for truly lasting visibility?

share.subtitle: Pick a platform — your post is pre-filled and links back to your slot.
share.promptSubtitle: show the world what you claimed.
share.storyHelp: 1080×1920 PNG — perfect for Instagram & TikTok stories

purchase.body: I just claimed a slot on The Last Billboard for €{bid}. The final ad space on the internet — bid to be seen, get displaced if someone outbids you. Come find my block 👇

outbid.heading: You took the slot — go flex it

outbid.body: I just outbid a slot on The Last Billboard. €{bid} got me the spot — until someone outbids me. Come watch the war 👇

own.title: My slot on The Last Billboard
own.heading: Bring more eyes to your slot
own.body: My slot is live on The Last Billboard for €{bid}. The final ad space on the internet — bid higher, get more space, or get displaced. See it before someone outbids me 👇

frozen.title: Billboard Frozen
frozen.message: The bidding period has ended. No more bids can be placed.

form.title: Place Your Bid
form.anonymousHelp: Your name and profile won't be shown — viewers see "anonymous". They can request to know who you are; you decide whether to reveal yourself.
form.identityHelp: Your slot always shows your profile name. Change it in settings — all your slots update automatically.
form.cropHint: [info] your slot can be portrait, square, or landscape. frame your image for each — the billboard picks the right crop automatically.

landing.title: The Last Billboard — Claim Your Space on the Internet's Final Advertising Grid
landing.description: Compete for visibility on the final billboard. Bid logarithmically, displace others, winner takes all when time runs out.

about.title: About The Last Billboard
about.description: Learn about The Last Billboard - the final advertising space where advertisers compete for eternal visibility.

bid.title: Place Your Bid — The Last Billboard
bid.description: Claim your space on the final billboard. Choose your image, set your bid, and compete for visibility.

bidCancel.title: Payment Cancelled — The Last Billboard
bidCancel.description: Your bid payment was cancelled. You can try again or return to the billboard.

dashboard.description: Manage your bids on The Last Billboard.

leaderboard.description: See who's leading the bidding war on The Last Billboard.

cookieBanner.message: We only use essential cookies for authentication and preferences. No tracking or analytics.

operator.title: Operator Information
operator.placeholder: Information according to legal requirements (§5 TMG / ECG / etc.)
operator.todoTitle: Operator details pending — administrator must configure operator data via environment variables before launch:

todoItems.name: Full legal name / Company name
todoItems.address: Full address (street, postal code, city, country)

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.liability: Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of the linked pages are solely responsible for their content.
disclaimer.externalLinks: External links to third-party websites are beyond our control. We distance ourselves from all content on linked pages and assume no liability for it.
disclaimer.copyright: All content and works on this website are subject to copyright. Reproduction requires written permission.

disputeResolution.title: Dispute Resolution
disputeResolution.text: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR). We are neither willing nor obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.text: We take the protection of your personal data seriously. This privacy policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights under GDPR.

dataCollection.title: Data We Collect
dataCollection.intro: We collect the following types of data:

personal.title: Personal Data You Provide
personal.email: Required for authentication and account management
personal.payment: Processed securely by Stripe (we never store credit card details)
personal.bids: Display name, link URL, brand color, and bid amount for your slots
personal.images: Images you upload for your advertising slots

automatic.title: Automatically Collected Data
automatic.cookies: Essential cookies for authentication and language preferences only
automatic.ip: Temporarily logged for security and abuse prevention
automatic.browser: User agent and browser information for compatibility

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Data
dataUsage.intro: We use your data for the following purposes:
dataUsage.display: Displaying your advertising slots on the billboard

processors.title: Data Processors (Third Parties)
processors.intro: We share your data with the following trusted processors:
processors.supabase: Authentication, database, and file storage (EU/US servers, GDPR-compliant)
processors.stripe: Payment processing and refunds (PCI-DSS Level 1 certified)
processors.vercel: Hosting and content delivery (global edge network)

rights.title: Your Rights Under GDPR

access.title: Right to Access
access.text: Request a copy of all data we hold about you

erasure.title: Right to Erasure
erasure.text: Request deletion of your account and data (excluding legally required records)

portability.title: Right to Data Portability
portability.text: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format

objection.title: Right to Object
objection.text: Object to processing based on legitimate interest

complaint.title: Right to Lodge a Complaint
complaint.text: File a complaint with your national data protection authority

rights.contact: To exercise your rights, contact us at
rights.todoEmail: Privacy contact email pending configuration — administrator must set LEGAL_PRIVACY_EMAIL before launch.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.noTracking: We do NOT use tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or advertising cookies.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.accounts: Account data and bids are retained as long as your account is active.
retention.transactions: Transaction records are retained for 10 years to comply with tax and accounting regulations.
retention.logs: Server logs (IP addresses) are deleted after 90 days.

security.title: Security Measures
security.text: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption (TLS/SSL), secure authentication (magic links), database encryption at rest, and regular security audits.

international.title: International Data Transfers
international.text: Your data may be processed in the EU and US. All processors are GDPR-compliant and provide adequate protection through Privacy Shield, Standard Contractual Clauses, or equivalent mechanisms.

updates.title: Policy Updates
updates.text: We may update this policy occasionally. Material changes will be communicated via email.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For privacy-related questions, contact us at:
contact.seeImprint: For full contact details, see our

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.text: By accessing or using The Last Billboard, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

service.title: Service Description
service.description: The Last Billboard is a digital advertising platform where users bid for space on a shared canvas. Slots are allocated based on bid amount, with size growing logarithmically.
service.freeze: After the countdown expires, the billboard enters a permanent frozen state and no further changes are possible.

account.title: Account Registration
account.magicLink: You must create an account using email authentication (magic link) to place bids.
account.responsibility: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and all activities under it.

minimum.title: Minimum Bid
minimum.text: The platform enforces a dynamic minimum bid amount

commission.title: Platform Commission
commission.text: All bids are subject to a 10% platform fee

size.title: Slot Size
size.text: Slot size is calculated logarithmically based on bid amount to ensure fairness

displacement.title: Displacement
displacement.text: Other users can outbid your slot. If displaced, you move to a new position or exit the billboard.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.text: If your slot is displaced, you automatically receive 90% of your bid as a refund. The 10% platform fee is non-refundable.

final.title: Final Bids
final.text: Bids are final and immutable once placed. You cannot edit or cancel a bid.

content.title: Content Policy
content.intro: You are solely responsible for the content you upload. By placing a bid, you represent that your content does not violate any laws or third-party rights.

prohibited.malware: Malware, phishing links, or malicious content

content.removal: We reserve the right to remove prohibited content without refund. Repeat violations may result in account termination.
content.license: By uploading content, you grant us a non-exclusive, worldwide license to display it on the billboard.

payment.title: Payment Terms
payment.stripe: All payments are processed through Stripe. By bidding, you agree to Stripe's Terms of Service.
payment.currency: All bids are in EUR (€). Currency conversion fees may apply.
payment.noChargebacks: Due to the nature of the service (instant slot allocation), chargebacks are strictly prohibited. Disputed charges will result in account termination.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.platform: The Last Billboard is provided "as-is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee uptime, availability, or slot persistence.
liability.userContent: We are not liable for user-generated content. Users are solely responsible for their slots.
liability.payment: We are not liable for payment processing errors caused by Stripe or your payment provider.
liability.noWarranty: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim all liability for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

indemnification.title: Indemnification
indemnification.text: You agree to indemnify and hold us harmless from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your use of the service, your content, or your violation of these terms.

freeze.title: Billboard Freeze
freeze.permanent: When the countdown ends, the billboard freezes permanently. All slots become immutable.
freeze.noRefunds: No refunds are issued for slots active at the time of freeze, regardless of duration held.

termination.title: Termination
termination.text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. Active slots may be removed without refund in cases of severe violations.

law.title: Governing Law
law.text: These terms are governed by applicable law; the specific jurisdiction is pending configuration.
law.textWithJurisdiction: These terms are governed by the laws of {jurisdiction}.
law.todoText: Applicable law (Swiss, German, EU, etc.) will be specified before production launch.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.text: We may update these terms at any time. Material changes will be announced with 14 days notice. Continued use constitutes acceptance.

severability.title: Severability
severability.text: If any provision of these terms is found invalid, the remaining provisions remain in full effect.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For questions about these terms, contact us at:
contact.seeImprint: For full contact details, see our
